channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Grass on roundabout so tall so lack of visibility, 20th May
item.description:
The roundabout at the end of Stoke Orchard Road is too tall it’s blocking all visibility
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I have been reporting the dreadful state of Salamanca Road for the past year, eventually you have turned up and stuck some tar stuff in quite a few holes but there are many many more that urgently need filling in as they are getting bigger and deeper every day, you people who looked at it did just drive past and ignore most of them, it needs attending to do them all and have done with it, I am fed up reporting this every few weeks, you keep saying it is in hand but it is not you have looked and ignored please fix them all once and for all please, 20th May
item.description:
From 18 to 30 Salamanca Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Salamanca Road, Oakley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ringway marked fencing and sand bags have been left here for months after work in damaged pavement, 20th May
item.description:
On the path connecting Finstock Close and Rissington Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Rissington Close, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 20th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 day carriage way pothole 800x600x40mm tarmac patch around gully frame stats required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lack of road drainage causing flooding, 20th May
item.description:
148 Hewlett Road GL52 6TT I have had a look at there are no road gullies to cater for this lower topography which is the cause. It is causing an issue with water spraying onto the property as cars pass. It is also in a school zone so possibly a safety issue as well as an inconvenience.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 153, Hewlett Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 20th May
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please replace x1 broken rocking dropped kerb stone 900x100x30mm stats required semi round (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Dumped appliance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thompson Way, Innsworth, Tewkesbury

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 20th May
item.description:
3 months Road closure please refresh give way markings markings on junction approx 28 600x200mm dots plus x2 3 meters lines (Faded Road Markings)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 20th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please reset x1 470x470x40mm lose sunken gully frame and cover in carriage way stats required (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked Drain, 20th May
item.description:
A drain opposite a junction of Folly Lane and St Paul's Road is blocked and has been fir a number of months. I reported this blockage a,week or so after a young lad tragically lost his life after being hit by a car whilst riding a motorised hire scooter. It is my view that he may have tried to avoid the surface water and therefore was struck by the car through no fault of his own. Following this previous report I received an email indicating that the blockage had been addressed and cleared...IT CLEARLY HAS NOT! Can this please be addressed as a matter of urgency before another tragically accident happens...I regularly use a bike along this route and have had to head into on coming traffic to avoid the surface water.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Paul's Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Subsiding on Oakfield Road, 20th May
item.description:
Road subsiding outside no 31 Oakfield Road. Collecting water.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43,45, Oakfield Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: No rain in 24 hours - water has increased or remained the same

item.title: Missing signs - Brockhampton Lane, 19th May
item.description:
The poles and light fittings for illuminated signs on both sides of Brockhampton Lane are in place, but there are no signs on them. My guess is they should be 40mph speed limit signs when approaching Hyde Lane, and National Speed Limit signs in the other direction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockhampton Lane, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole around edge of street drain, outside blenheim court, 19th May
item.description:
In Back Lane, on left side of the road going from library/school towards North Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Back Lane, Winchcombe, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
